blockingIssues.description: Version-metadata violations remain unresolved and spread into the latest rerun fixes. `fix-test-file-line-limits` bumps `package.json`, `packages/extension/manifest.json`, and `packages/extension/manifest.firefox.json` to `0.4.62`, `fix-providerinstance-base-type` bumps the same files again to `0.4.63`, and the branch still does not restore the documented pre-refactor baseline `0.4.60`, so the earlier `fix-version-bump-issues` blocker is still open.

`packages/shared/src/provider-instance.ts` still does not make the ProviderConnectionConfig-derived base authoritative for `ProviderInstance`: the type now extends `Partial<ProviderInstanceBase>`, but `providerType` remains the canonical provider field and `extractConnectionFromProvider()` still derives `provider` from `providerType`, so `ProfileConfig` and `ProviderInstance` can still diverge instead of sharing one base shape.

`npm run check:repo-standards` still fails because `tests/unit/suites/runtime-messages.test.ts` is 369 lines and exceeds the changed-file guardrail, so the earlier runtime-message test cleanup remains incomplete.

`npm run check:repo-standards` also fails on deep shared imports introduced or still present in `tests/unit/suites/profile/*.test.ts` and `tests/unit/suites/provider-instance/*.test.ts`, which import `../../../../packages/shared/src/profile.js` directly instead of the `@parchi/shared` entrypoint.

appliedUpdates.description: Added `check:repo-standards: npm run check:repo-standards` to `.factory/services.yaml` so the shared command manifest matches the repo and skill requirement to run this guardrail before handoff.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit completion gate that requires recorded passing evidence for `npm run lint` and `npm run check:repo-standards`, forbids `followedProcedure: true` when those checks are missing or failing, and rejects package/manifest version bumps outside release/versioning work during final diff review.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: `fix-test-file-line-limits` reports `skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true` even though its own handoff records `npm run lint` exiting 1 and omits a passing repo-standards run, while both `fix-test-file-line-limits` and `fix-providerinstance-base-type` still bundled forbidden version bumps.

rejectedObservations.observation: `.factory/library/architecture.md` is stale for the shared provider-type layout and still references `packages/shared/src/providers.ts`.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented in `.factory/library/shared-foundation-notes.md`, which already records the current split across `profile.ts`, `connection-config.ts`, and `provider-instance.ts`; no extra library edit was necessary in this rerun.
